arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion have been credited with an interest in IF Elfsborg’s Terry Yegbe, according to claims from Ghana. It was stated the 24-year-old is the priority defensive target for Brighton after impressing Fabian Hürzeler. Fotbollskanalen points out it out and provide more on the claims linking the centre-back to the Seagulls.
